channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: "To Everyone Else, He Was A Nice Guy": The Reality Of Stalking In India | I Witness - Seriously, it's a tricky situation, ya know?
item.description: The video shares first-hand accounts of women in India who have experienced stalking. It highlights the common misconception that stalkers are always outwardly aggressive, often presenting as 'nice gu...

item.title: Montreal launches emergency plan amid rising flood concerns
item.description: On April 15, 2026, Montreal activated a special emergency response plan as rising water levels triggered flood warnings across several areas of the city. Local authorities, led by city officials and e...

item.title: Ex-AFP Commissary Manager Convicted for Graft and Malversation Over Missing Inventory
item.description: The Sandiganbayan has affirmed the conviction of Norma Mendoza, former manager of the AFP Commissary and Exchange Service at Camp Melchor dela Cruz, Gamu, Isabela, for graft and malversation. The case...

item.title: SIU seizes Maumela’s luxury cars and properties in ongoing Tembisa Hospital corruption probe
item.description: The Special Investigating Unit (SIU) has seized luxury assets belonging to Hangwani Maumela, who is accused of being at the centre of the Tembisa Hospital looting scandal. Among the items attached are...

item.title: EAM Jaishankar Condemns Attacks on Merchant Shipping in Strait of Hormuz
item.description: External Affairs Minister S Jaishankar has firmly stated that attacks on merchant shipping are completely unacceptable, underscoring India's strong commitment to safe and unimpeded transit passage for...

item.title: CDA demolishes houses in Noorpur Shahan amid anti-encroachment drive
item.description: On Wednesday, the Capital Development Authority (CDA) carried out a major demolition operation in Noorpur Shahan, Islamabad, removing nearly 200 houses under heavy police deployment. The operation fol...

item.title: Mayor Wahab criticises JI’s civic banners and warns printing presses of legal action
item.description: In Karachi, tensions between the Pakistan Peoples Party (PPP) and the opposition Jamaat-i-Islami (JI) have heightened after Mayor Murtaza Wahab warned of shutting down printing presses producing banne...

item.title: Police investigate case of missing twin after birth in Lagos hospital
item.description: The Lagos State Police Command don start investigation into one serious matter wey happen for one hospital inside Abaranje area of Ikotun, Lagos. According to reports, one woman wey just born twins ta...

item.title: Man jailed for causing death of friend in high-speed crash near Aberdeen
item.description: Josh Buchan, 26, has been sentenced to seven-and-a-half years in prison for causing the death of his teenage friend, Ben Taylor, in a high-speed car crash on the outskirts of Aberdeen in 2022. Taylor,...

item.title: US‑Iran blockade and Middle East tensions ripple into Australia with Geelong refinery fire and fuel‑supply worries
item.description: Intensifying tensions between the United States and Iran are casting a long shadow over global energy markets, with Australia feeling the impact through a major fire at the Viva Energy Group oil refin...

item.title: Sheria Mtaani Opposes Granting Prosecutorial Powers to EACC, Warns of Legal Action
item.description: Sheria Mtaani, a prominent legal lobby group in Kenya, has expressed strong opposition to any legislative changes that would give the Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission (EACC) prosecutorial powers....

item.title: Chennai: Postal Voting Underway for Tamil Nadu Assembly Elections
item.description: Postal voting commenced in Chennai on April 16, 2026, as part of the upcoming Assembly elections in Tamil Nadu. The exercise, designed for senior citizens aged 85 and above, and individuals with disab...

item.title: Tanzania Engages Standard Chartered to Seek Financing for SGR Construction
item.description: Tanzania, represented by Dr Juma Malik Akil on behalf of the Finance Minister, Ambassador Khamis Mussa Omar, held official discussions with a delegation from Standard Chartered Bank, led by CEO for Af...

item.title: Welsh NHS Faces Scrutiny as First Minister Acknowledges Challenges in North Wales
item.description: Ahead of the Welsh Senedd election, the First Minister has publicly acknowledged significant challenges within the North Wales National Health Service (NHS). During a 'Your Voice Live' programme, the ...

item.title: Woman awarded $163 million after being served excessive tequila on cruise
item.description: A woman has been awarded $163,220,000 in damages after a court ruled she was served 14 shots of tequila during a Carnival cruise, leading to severe intoxication and subsequent harm. The incident repor...

item.title: Political cartoon questions alignment between the Coalition and One Nation on immigration policy
item.description: This Guardian piece, created by cartoonist Fiona Katauskas, uses a political cartoon to comment on the growing alignment between Australia’s Coalition government and the One Nation party on immigratio...

item.title: General Sundarji: Innovator of Mechanised Warfare and Mentor of Indian Army Officers
item.description: General Krishnaswamy Sundarji was a remarkable Indian Army officer whose career was defined by bold strategic thinking and a forward-looking approach to modern warfare. Educated at the US Army Command...

item.title: Alex Cooper Shares Messages Refuting Claims Amid Influencer Dispute
item.description: Podcast host Alex Cooper publicly addressed a growing online dispute involving fellow influencers Brianna LaPaglia and Alix Earle. Cooper denied accusations of being a 'mean girl,' sharing screenshots...

item.title: Kenyan Fuel Prices Increase, Sparking Public Concerns and Questions About Procurement
item.description: Fuel prices in Kenya have significantly increased, causing widespread frustration and prompting questions about the government's procurement strategies. The latest price hike has seen costs rise acros...

item.title: Meghan Markle to appear as guest on MasterChef Australia amid mixed audience reaction
item.description: Meghan Markle, the Duchess of Sussex, is set to make a special guest appearance on the upcoming season of MasterChef Australia. The news was announced by Channel Ten through Instagram, featuring a pho...
